task_completion.description: Verify that a new address book named 'TechExpo 2026' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Thunderbird Address Book window is open, and 'TechExpo 2026' is clearly visible in the left sidebar pane.

task_completion.description: Verify that Sarah Jenkins was added to the 'TechExpo 2026' address book.
task_completion.visual_evidence: With 'TechExpo 2026' selected in the sidebar, Sarah Jenkins or her email 's.jenkins@aerodynamics-corp.com' is visible in the main contact list.

task_completion.description: Verify that Marcus Vance was added to the 'TechExpo 2026' address book.
task_completion.visual_evidence: With 'TechExpo 2026' selected in the sidebar, Marcus Vance or his email 'mvance@vance-industrial.com' is visible in the main contact list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent initiates an export of the address book to a CSV file with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' or 'Save As' dialog box is open, showing the target file name 'techexpo_leads.csv' and the file type set to 'Comma Separated' (.csv).

task_completion.description: Verify that the CSV file was successfully saved to the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or terminal shows 'techexpo_leads.csv' located in the '~/Documents' directory, or the agent opens the resulting CSV file to display its contents, or the save dialog is successfully confirmed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Thunderbird application to create the address book and add contacts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interaction with the graphical Thunderbird Address Book interface, rather than using terminal commands to modify SQLite databases directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not manually type the CSV file contents in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file should be generated via Thunderbird's built-in export function. There should be no screenshots of text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) being used to manually type the contact details into a CSV format.

integrity.description: Verify the agent exported only the 'TechExpo 2026' address book.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export action (e.g., right-click context menu) should be triggered specifically on the 'TechExpo 2026' address book in the sidebar, not on 'All Address Books' or 'Personal Address Book'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target CSV path: /home/ga/Documents/techexpo_leads.csv. Target contacts to be included: s.jenkins@aerodynamics-corp.com and mvance@vance-industrial.com. Background contact that MUST NOT be included in the export: e.vargas@global-logistics.net.
